name: grapefruit
summary: Mechanism context: intestinal CYP3A4 mechanism-based inhibition by furanocoumarins, P-gp modulation, OATP transporter effects. Safety: Major food-drug interaction risk: can raise exposure of statins, calcium-channel blockers, immunosuppressants, antiarrhythmics, and other CYP3A4/OATP substrates.. Interactions tracked: CYP3A4, P-gp, and OATP-mediated interactions.

preparation: Interaction risk varies by whole fruit, juice, cultivar, dose, and furanocoumarin content.
